---
layout: cv
title: Lexie Baine's CV
---
# Isaac Newton
Student

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="lexiebaine@gmail.com">lexiebaine@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaac_Newton">My wikipedia page</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://yourusername.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="C:\Users\lexie\OneDrive\Documents\GitHub\lexiebaine0330.github.io\Lexie_Baine_Resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Going to school for a Bachelors in Accounting

### Specialized in

Data Science and Event Planning


### Research interests

Using data science to make accounting and event planning run more efficiently. 


## Education

`2020-2024`
__Associates in General Studies at BYU-Idaho__

`2026 - now`
__Bachelors in Accounting at BYU-Idaho__




## Awards

None yet



## Publications

<!-- A list is also available [online](http://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=LTOTl0YAAAAJ) -->

### Journals

None Yet

### Patents

None Yet


## Occupation

Student



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
